name: orca-agentmemory-stack
description: Conservative Orca workflow stack for multi-agent coordination, durable memory, and GitNexus-aware code work.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate Orca tasks with durable memory.
interface.longDescription: A conservative workflow stack for Orca-managed multi-agent tasks. Orca owns live coordination, GitNexus handles code intelligence when installed, and agentmemory stores durable decisions and handoffs without automatic context injection.
defaultPrompt: Use the Orca agentmemory workflow for this task.
Run this as a conservative multi-agent Orca task.
